scan.note: FC03 reg 40001 (wire 0) wind-speed register; proven on hardware (Phase 6c).

provisioning.note: Default unit ID 1; discovered by scan at commissioning.

conflicts: Authored to match the compiled Phase-6c RS-FSJT path byte-for-byte (device 0x02, FC03 reg 0, raw/10 = m/s, payload wind x100 u16) so the profile-driven reader can be validated byte-identical against the compiled path on real hardware.
RS-FSJT scale raw/10 = m/s confirmed on bench 2026-06-24 (blow test); a /100 variant exists on some units.
